title: Media Activities Specialist
description: Multi-tasking Media Relations professional with a results-oriented approach to strategic initiatives, event planning, writing, and editing. Proven ability to improve media coverage, increase interviews, and host successful television programs. Led Chattanooga State to receive National Awards, including Bronze and Silver Paragon Awards, for various media and promotional content.
experience: Currently a Media Activities Specialist, responsible for organizing major campus events by overseeing security, media, food services, and marketing, and creating videos for academic and recruitment purposes. Previously served as a Marketing Coordinator, engaging in strategic planning to increase enrollment, utilizing market research, supporting branding through diverse media (press releases, ads, website content, print materials), managing an advertising budget up to $500,000, supervising staff, and producing radio, TV commercials, and instructional videos. Also increased media presence at events and served as a spokesperson.
